- Vacant

- 24 hour security
- DMCC trade licence
- High speed elevators

This 1366 square foot office is available for rent in Goldcrest Executive, Jumeirah Lakes Towers. The office will come fully furnished and luxury fitted. It is located in Cluster C, next to the metro. To occupy this office a DMCC Trade licence is required. The office can be personalised within reason.

Goldcrest Executive in JLT is a modern mixed-use development by ETA Star – Giga. Launched in 2005 and completed in 2009, the 165-metre-tall tower comprises 40 floors, with offices occupying floors 1 to 20 and studio flats and 1-bedroom apartments on floors 21 to 38.

Office Overview
This impeccably designed, fully fitted office features bespoke finishes, sculptural lighting, and panoramic skyline views. Delivering a hospitality-grade atmosphere, it is ideal for family offices, financial institutions, legal practices, and firms seeking a distinguished headquarters. Available from September, the space is move-in ready and crafted to impress clients from the moment they arrive.

• Grand luxury reception with sculptural stone desk and designer seating

• 3 meeting rooms + private call/Skype rooms
• Client lounge with luxury bar and barista-grade setup
• High-end pantry and fully equipped kitchen
• Spacious open workspace suitable for teams and collaborative setups

Building Amenities

• On-site parking, retail, dining, and fitness facilities

Accessibility
• Walking distance to Financial Centre Metro
• Easy access to Sheikh Zayed Road
• Close to luxury hotels, Gate Avenue, and DIFC’s premium dining destinations

Positioned in the heart of DIFC, Burj Daman offers world-class facilities and unmatched connectivity to business and lifestyle hubs, making it the perfect choice for firms seeking prestige, convenience, and a superior working environment.

Disclaimer: All measurements and property details are provided to the best of our knowledge. Savoir Prive Properties assumes no liability for inaccuracies or discrepancies.

Property.Property_Title: Vacant | Chiller Free | Ready to move in
Property.Property_Description:
Business Central Towers is a landmark twin-tower commercial development located along Sheikh Zayed Road in Dubai Media City and Dubai Internet City. the project consists of two Grade-A office towers connected by a six-level podium. The towers rise approximately 265 meters high and feature a design inspired by New York’s Chrysler Building, making them one of the most recognizable business complexes in the area.

The development offers premium office spaces, retail outlets, conference facilities, health clubs, swimming pools, underground parking, and high-speed elevators. Its strategic location provides direct access to Sheikh Zayed Road, Dubai Metro stations, Dubai Marina, Palm Jumeirah, and other major commercial hubs, making it a preferred destination for multinational companies, technology firms, and professional businesses.

Welcome to Grand Bleu Tower 1 at EMAAR Beachfront — an iconic branded residence designed in collaboration with Elie Saab, offering luxury waterfront living with direct private beach access and the open sea right at your doorstep.

This stunning fully furnished 1-bedroom apartment spans 780 sq. ft. and is perfectly designed for elegant beachfront living. Located in one of the most desirable towers within EMAAR Beachfront, the residence enjoys breathtaking sea, Palm Jumeirah, and Marina skyline views. Enjoy the vibrant marina lifestyle with a beautiful promenade perfect for walking or running, a yacht club with affordable membership options, cafés, brunch spots, beauty salons, and popular nightlife destinations like Bar Du Port — all within the community.

The apartment features refined Elie Saab-inspired interiors, a bright open-plan layout, and floor-to-ceiling windows that fill the space with natural light. The spacious living and dining area opens onto a large private balcony overlooking the sea, while the modern kitchen is fitted with premium finishes and high-end appliances. The bedroom includes built-in wardrobes, while a separate laundry/storage room adds extra convenience.

Residents enjoy world-class amenities including a private beach, infinity pool, state-of-the-art gym, landscaped leisure areas, BBQ spaces, concierge service, retail promenade, fine dining, yacht club lifestyle, and 24/7 security.

Ideally located in Dubai Harbour, EMAAR Beachfront provides seamless access to Dubai Marina, Palm Jumeirah, Sheikh Zayed Road, and Dubai’s key lifestyle destinations.

Property Features:
• All bills included
• Fully furnished turnkey apartment with Elie Saab-designed interiors
• Balcony with sea views
• Separate laundry/storage area
• Covered parking
• Private beach access & resort-style amenities

An exceptional opportunity to enjoy luxury beachfront living in one of Dubai’s most exclusive coastal communities.
